query: Rebuild CI into necessary-and-sufficient common and dynamic gates

tasks.title: Audit the current CI, workspace scripts, engine/db assets, and workflow surfaces to define common gates vs dynamic gates
Add common gates for workflow lint, automation smoke, Python syntax, shell syntax, and fail-fast security audit
Add change-aware workspace and migration validation with dependency-aware workspace expansion
Resolve newly enforced CI blockers so the new gates are green by default
Record the CI contract in docs and project memory so the common/dynamic split stays truthful
